title: Presidential Nominations Submitted to Senate for Confirmation
summary: A list of individuals nominated by the President to fill various federal positions subject to Senate confirmation, including Director of the Peace Corps, Ambassador to Belize, Inspector General of the Department of Justice, and other executive branch positions. These nominations were transmitted to the Senate for the confirmation process as required by the Constitution.

title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Limited Partnership to Operate Pipeline Facilities at U.S.-Canada Border in North Dakota
summary: This Presidential Permit grants Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership authorization to operate and maintain three existing pipeline facilities located at Pembina County, North Dakota, at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit is issued pursuant to the President's constitutional and statutory authority and is subject to specified conditions outlined in the permit document. Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership is a Delaware-organized limited partnership being granted this authorization for cross-border pipeline operations.

title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Pipelines (Southern Lights) L.L.C. to Operate Existing Pipeline Facilities at U.S.-Canada Border in North Dakota
summary: This Presidential permit authorizes Enbridge Pipelines (Southern Lights) L.L.C., a Delaware limited liability company, to operate and maintain existing pipeline infrastructure located at the international boundary between the United States and Canada in Pembina County, North Dakota. The permit grants the company authorization to conduct specified activities at the cross-border pipeline facilities, subject to conditions outlined in the executive order.
